summary: Completed comprehensive testing of sandbox gameplay layer and transparent dice resolution features. All 89 backend API tests passed including new sandbox CRUD operations (inventory, properties, finances, transactions) and German dice resolution with transparent display. Frontend dashboard loads perfectly with full navigation functionality.
passed_tests: All 89 backend API tests passed (100% success rate)
Transparent dice resolution with German categories (Kritischer Erfolg/Erfolg/Teilerfolg/Fehlschlag/Kritischer Fehlschlag)
Scene response with sandbox support ([TRANSAKTION] and [INVENTAR] markers)
Smart context integration includes inventory/finances/properties data
All navigation works (Dashboard, Campaigns, Characters, NPCs, Lore, Rules & Tone, Channels, Event Log)
